findings.title: Destructive bulk action with no confirmation step
findings.message: `archiveSelected()` mutates the status of every selected engagement in place and immediately clears the selection — there is no confirm dialog, no undo affordance, and the change isn't surfaced anywhere reversible in this UI. WCAG 3.3.4 (Error Prevention — Legal, Financial, Data) requires that actions on financial records be at least one of: reversible from the same screen, validated against likely errors, or explicitly confirmed by the user. Wrap the call in a confirm dialog showing the count and the affected client names, or add an in-line undo banner that stays visible for ~10s after the action completes. The button's markup is fine on its own — the issue is the absence of a confirmation step around a destructive operation on engagement records.
